steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The goal calls for an example, which requires naming a specific particle physicist and connecting them to the field — not discussing physics in general.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• Choice A — 'discusses neutrino research generally': Describes the field without naming any specific physicist. Doesn't fulfill "example." ✗
  • Choice B — 'names Samoil M. Bilenky and his neutrino research': A specific physicist is named and connected to neutrino research — exactly what an example requires. ✓
  • Choice C — 'discusses practices in particle physics generally': No specific physicist named. Too general. ✗
  • Choice D — 'discusses ideas in particle physics generally': Same problem — general discussion, no named individual. ✗
That matches choice B — B is correct.
